name: Invisible Stalkers
description: Summoned by the 6th-level spell (spoken or from scrolls), a faultless tracker that follows until its mission is done, then returns to its non-dimension. It never wavers and is stopped only by destruction — or Dispel Magic. But it resents long service: set to endless duty (guard me a month, a year), it will honor the letter while perverting the spirit — carrying its ward to its own non-dimensional plane into suspended animation; assume this succeeds on a 12 with 2d6, checked daily or weekly.
special_notes: stopped only by destruction or Dispel Magic
letter-vs-spirit subversion on open-ended missions (2d6=12 check)
